Related Entities

  • hospital CAPE REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER INC 3-star overall rating
  • snf AUTUMN LAKE HEALTHCARE AT OCEANVIEW 3-star, 120 beds
  • snf FOUNTAIN SPRINGS AT CAPE MAY NURSING & REHAB CENTE 5-star, 116 beds
  • snf COMPLETE CARE AT COURT HOUSE, LLC 5-star, 120 beds
  • snf CREST HAVEN NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTER 4-star, 180 beds
  • snf NORTH CAPE CENTER 4-star, 120 beds
  • snf UNITED METHODIST COMMUNITIES AT THE SHORES 5-star, 60 beds
  • snf PELICAN POINTE POST ACUTE NURSING & REHABILITATION 3-star, 120 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
